title: Vajra Returns
description: Legendary multi-tool port to modern versions of minecraft, which works on FE energy!
body:
# Vajra returns!
This mod adds **Vajra**, which is a powerful tool inspired by the Vajra from Industrial Craft 2, but redesigned for modern Minecraft Forge 1.20.1!

Also adds "Vajra Core", which is just an item for craft. 
This multi-tool has 3 features:
- 🔹 Instant block breaking
- 🔹 High melee damage
- 🔹 Unbreakable

Tool needs to be charged with FE energy, because without energy it can`t insta-break blocks.

![How it looks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce5ec17c4e0b7ec1ffffad514223f2599366e8bd_0.webp)
You are absolutely free to use it in modpack and can contribute it.

Textures are also from Industrial Craft!
